(C) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

C - 5m - B (with Left-Left-Right movements)
3m down, 3m movements
Q - 5m - O - 2m - P (with Starting point marked)
West
OP = 2m
OB = OC = 3m
BC = CQ = 5m
∴ Required distance, QP = OQ + OP = 5 + 2 = 7m

(D) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

Starting P position with 30m South movement
Q - Left 15m - R (with Right movements)
20m Right movements to S
Final point T - 15m
PQ = 30m
QR = TS = 15m
QT = RS = 20m
∴ Required distance, PT = PQ + QT = 30 + 20 = 50m

(d) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

P = Starting point
T = Finishing point
PQ = RS = 30m
R - 40m - Q (with Left-Left movements)
30m movements, 30m North
S - Left - 40m - P - 10m - T
50m total
QR = SP = 40m
ST = 50m
∴ Required distance, PT = ST - SP = 50 - 40 = 10m

(d) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

House - Finishing point
Q 15 km West P - T
Left movements
20 km - 20 km
Left - Left
R - 25 km - S

PQ = 15 km
QR = TS = 20 km
RS = 25 km
∴ Required distance, PT = QT = QP = RS = QP = 25 - 15 = 10 km

(b) According to the question, the direction diagram is as follows

B - 5 km - C - 4 km - A
Right - 3 km North
3 km Right movements
C - 5 km West - D Starting point

D = Starting point for A and B
CD = BD = 5 km
BC = CD = 3 km
∴ Required distance, AB = BO + OA = 5 + 4 = 9 km

(C) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

A - 5 ft - B - E
6 ft movements
C - 4 ft - D

A = Initial point
E = Finishing point
AB = 5ft
BC = DE = 6 ft
BE = CD = 4ft
∴ Required distance, BE = 4ft
